exercises.name: Plate Loaded Bench Press
exercises.notes: Target 5 per set. Hit 4x5 @ 72 at RPE 8 last time — hold and get all 4 sets at RPE<=7 before adding.

exercises.name: Leg Press 45
exercises.notes: Target 12 per set. Did 3x12 @ 140 but RPE 9 — same reps, goal is to bring RPE down to <=8 before adding load.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.notes: Target 10 per set. Hit 3x10 @ 20 but at RPE 10 — your hardest lift. Hold at 20, chase a clean 3x10 at lower RPE.

exercises.name: Lateral Raise
exercises.notes: Target 12 per set. First log in this slot (replaced Tricep Pushdown), conservative 10kg start. Strict form, lead with elbows. If 3x12 is RPE<=7, push to 15 reps next time, then 12.5kg.

exercises.name: Cable Crunch
exercises.notes: Target 15 per set. Last time 12/15/15 @ 65 RPE 8 — only the first set fell short. Lock in a full 3x15 before adding. Kneeling, facing the stack.

exercises.name: Reverse Curl
exercises.notes: Target 10 per set. Up 2.5kg (did 3x12 @ 22 at RPE 8 — earned it). Expect reps to drop at the heavier load; 10 clean is the goal. Permanent last exercise.
